race.comment: ESJAY (12) appreciated a drop in grade when an eye-catching third to SOOTHSAYER in the 1350m Eye Liner at Ipswich a fortnight ago. Again cursed by a bad gate but he can settle back then storm home late under the light weight. Honest sprinter BAND OF BROTHERS (11) led everywhere bar the post when resuming over 1200m in the Listed Hinkler at Eagle Farm last time out. Strong second-up performer who is a winner here at this distance. Should spear over from the wide gate and give backers a great sight as usual. GERRINGONG (8) chimed in late to get up for third in the Group One Tatts Tiara over this distance at Eagle Farm last Saturday. In form mare with definite claims from a better gate today. KING ZEPHYR (13) is becoming costly - expect him to arrive late on the scene.
